member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiClientOptions
member.summary: Options used when registering the generated assessment API clients.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiClientOptions.BaseAddress
member.summary: Base address of the running Assessment API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiClientOptions.BearerToken
member.summary: Optional bearer token added to outgoing requests.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException
member.summary: Exception thrown when the Assessment API returns a non-success response.

member.name: M:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}},System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates an exception without a typed error payload.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException.RawResponseBody
member.summary: Raw response body returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException.Headers
member.summary: Response headers returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException.TraceId
member.summary: API trace identifier, when returned by the server.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException.ValidationErrors
member.summary: Validation errors returned by the server, when available.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException`1
member.summary: Exception thrown when the API returns a typed error response.

member.name: M:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException`1.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String}},`0,System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates an exception with a typed error payload.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiException`1.Result
member.summary: Typed response body returned by the API.

member.summary: Server trace identifier for troubleshooting.

member.summary: HTTP status code.

member.summary: Human-readable error message.

member.summary: Field-level validation errors, when applicable.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ApiErrorResponse.Timestamp
member.summary: UTC time when the error was created.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderItemRequest
member.summary: Product item in a create order request.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderItemRequest.ProductId
member.summary: Product identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderItemRequest.Quantity
member.summary: Quantity ordered.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderRequest
member.summary: Request body used to create an order.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderRequest.CustomerId
member.summary: Customer placing the order.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderRequest.OrderNumber
member.summary: Client-provided order reference.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderRequest.Priority
member.summary: Order priority where lower values are handled first.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderRequest.Currency
member.summary: Currency used for all order amounts.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateOrderRequest.Items
member.summary: Products included in the order.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateProductRequest
member.summary: Request body used to create a product.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateProductRequest.Sku
member.summary: Stock keeping unit.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateProductRequest.Name
member.summary: Product display name.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateProductRequest.Price
member.summary: Unit price.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateProductRequest.Currency
member.summary: Price currency.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CreateProductRequest.QuantityAvailable
member.summary: Initial available quantity.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerInfo
member.summary: Customer information embedded in order responses.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerInfo.Id
member.summary: Customer identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerInfo.Name
member.summary: Customer name.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerInfo.Email
member.summary: Email used for order communication.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfile
member.summary: Advanced customer profile model kept in a deliberately long namespace.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfile.Id
member.summary: Profile identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfile.Segment
member.summary: Customer segment name.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfile.IsActive
member.summary: Whether advanced ordering rules are enabled.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfileInfo
member.summary: Customer commercial settings.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfileInfo.Tier
member.summary: Loyalty tier used for pricing rules.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfileInfo.PaymentTermDays
member.summary: Default payment term in days.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerProfileInfo.PreferredCurrency
member.summary: Preferred invoice currency.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerResponse
member.summary: Customer details returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerResponse.Id
member.summary: Unique customer identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerResponse.Name
member.summary: Customer display name.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerResponse.Email
member.summary: Customer email address.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.CustomerResponse.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the customer can place new orders.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.DeliveryPlan
member.summary: Delivery planning details.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.DeliveryPlan.Carrier
member.summary: Preferred carrier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.DeliveryPlan.EstimatedDate
member.summary: Estimated delivery date.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.DeliveryPlan.AllowWeekendDelivery
member.summary: Whether weekend delivery is allowed.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.InventoryInfo
member.summary: Inventory details for a product.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.InventoryInfo.QuantityAvailable
member.summary: Quantity available to sell.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.InventoryInfo.ReorderLevel
member.summary: Reorder threshold.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.OrderResponse
member.summary: Order details returned by the API.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.OrderResponse.Id
member.summary: Unique order identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.OrderResponse.OrderNumber
member.summary: Customer purchase order reference.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.OrderResponse.Status
member.summary: Current order status.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.OrderResponse.Priority
member.summary: Order priority where lower values are handled first.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.OrderResponse.ProductItems
member.summary: Ordered products.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PagedResultOfProductResponse
member.summary: Generic page wrapper used for list responses.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PagedResultOfProductResponse.Page
member.summary: Current page number.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PagedResultOfProductResponse.PageSize
member.summary: Maximum items returned in a page.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PagedResultOfProductResponse.TotalCount
member.summary: Total matching item count.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PagedResultOfProductResponse.Items
member.summary: Items in the current page.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PaymentSummary
member.summary: Payment totals for an order.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PaymentSummary.Currency
member.summary: Transaction currency.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PaymentSummary.Subtotal
member.summary: Subtotal before tax.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PaymentSummary.Tax
member.summary: Tax amount.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PaymentSummary.Total
member.summary: Total including tax.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.PaymentSummary.IsPaid
member.summary: Whether payment has been captured.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductItem
member.summary: Product line item in an order response.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductItem.ProductId
member.summary: Product identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductItem.Name
member.summary: Product name.

member.summary: Quantity ordered.

member.summary: Unit price.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductItem.LineTotal
member.summary: Line total.

member.summary: Product identifier.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductResponse.Sku
member.summary: Stock keeping unit.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductResponse.Name
member.summary: Product name.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductResponse.Price
member.summary: Unit price in the configured currency.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductResponse.Currency
member.summary: Currency used for the price.

member.name: P:AssessmentApiClient.Models.ProductResponse.IsActive
member.summary: Whether the product can be sold.

member.summary: Warehouse location details.

member.summary: Warehouse code.

member.summary: Warehouse city.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.Hooks.IAssessmentApiClientHook
member.summary: Hook that can inspect or modify outgoing requests and incoming responses.

member.name: M:AssessmentApiClient.Hooks.IAssessmentApiClientHook.BeforeRequestAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpRequestMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs immediately before an HTTP request is sent.

member.name: M:AssessmentApiClient.Hooks.IAssessmentApiClientHook.AfterResponseAsync(System.Net.Http.HttpResponseMessage,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs after an HTTP response is received.

member.summary: Small example showing dependency injection registration and typed exception handling.

member.name: T:AssessmentApiClient.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Dependency injection helpers for Assessment API clients.

member.name: M:AssessmentApiClient.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAssessmentApiClient(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{AssessmentApiClient.AssessmentApiClientOptions},System.Action{System.Net.Http.HttpClient})
member.summary: Registers generated Assessment API clients backed by HttpClientFactory.
